events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need reason. Scenario: timing marks misaligned by a tooth on automotive timing belt/chain. Work rough-complete. This is out of tolerance; timing must align exactly per OEM. Decision fail. Risk high/critical? Misaligned timing by a tooth can cause poor performance, engine damage, valve/piston interference in interference engines. Residential job? Automotive & Powertrain scope. Risk high maybe critical if interference engine. We can say high. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80. Value: misalignment by one tooth. Could express as 1 tooth. Confidence high 0.95. Findings: timing marks off by one tooth; incorrect valve timing. Actions: re-time engine per OEM, verify alignment, rotate and recheck. Rationale. References: OEM service info. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside.
